auditor: Prairie Point Chartered Professional Accountants LLP
economic_notes: First Nation holds portfolio investments in Kakina Economic Development Group LP (10%), Ontario First Nations Limited Partnership, Sovereign Wealth LP (0.3918% interest, primarily holds Hydro One shares), Treaty 3 Investment Group, and Niiwin Partnership. Sovereign Wealth LP reported net earnings of $76.2M in 2019 (WBFN share ~$299K). COVID-19 noted as subsequent event with unknown financial impact. Nation changed name from Obashkaandagaang First Nation to Washagamis Bay First Nation during the year.
notes: Washagamis Bay Investment Corporation is fully consolidated as a subsidiary. Ontario First Nations Limited Partnership is treated as a portfolio investment at cost (not consolidated as a GBE). The statement of change in net financial assets shows net financial assets of $858,077 at year end (up from net debt of $157,627 prior year), largely due to a large deferred revenue balance of $4.55M related to Minor Capital (Water Treatment Project and Immediate Needs Housing). Capital asset contribution received of $1,699,131 was recorded directly to accumulated surplus, not through operations. ISC holds two interest-free loans totalling $1,757,355 related to flooding and land claims. No schedule of remuneration was included in the provided financial statements. Nation changed name from Obashkaandagaang First Nation during the year.
